## Problem

What agent-building problem would this solve?

## Proposed shape

Describe the command, API, tool contract, Studio surface, or documentation you
expect.

## Runtime contract impact

Does this affect traces, policy, context snapshots, replay, evals, artifacts,
memory, or conformance?
